$comment: UI node-type catalog. Served by the agent via list_node_types. When you add a new node component, append an entry here so the agent can compose with it. Port kinds: 'stream' (frame-by-frame) or 'parameter' (event/value).

node_types.label: Source
node_types.description: External input (camera, video file, Spout, NDI, Syphon).

node_types.label: Pipeline
node_types.description: A generative or transform pipeline. Ports depend on the pipeline schema — call get_pipeline_schema.

node_types.label: Sink
node_types.description: Output — WebRTC preview by default; set sink_mode for Spout/NDI/Syphon output.

node_types.label: Record
node_types.description: Records the input stream to an MP4 file. Controlled via start_recording / stop_recording.

node_types.label: Primitive
node_types.description: Static value producer — strings (prompts), numbers, booleans.

node_types.label: Slider
node_types.description: Continuous float control with min/max.

node_types.label: Knobs
node_types.description: Bank of rotary knobs (multi-value).

node_types.label: XY Pad
node_types.description: 2D positional control.

node_types.label: Bool
node_types.description: Toggle.

node_types.label: Trigger
node_types.description: Momentary button — fires a pulse.

node_types.label: Control
node_types.description: Generic controller (supports switch mode for multi-input selection).

node_types.label: Math
node_types.description: Arithmetic ops on numeric inputs.

node_types.label: Tuple
node_types.description: Group several values into a structured bundle.

node_types.label: Reroute
node_types.description: Visual re-routing point — passes value through.

node_types.label: Note
node_types.description: Freeform annotation — not executable.

node_types.label: Image
node_types.description: Static image reference (e.g. VACE conditioning).

node_types.label: Audio
node_types.description: Audio input/output.

node_types.label: VACE
node_types.description: VACE reference-image conditioning node — feeds vace_ref_images + vace_context_scale to a supporting pipeline.

node_types.label: LoRA
node_types.description: LoRA adapter — attaches to a pipeline, sets scale.

node_types.label: MIDI
node_types.description: MIDI input (CC / note / clock).

node_types.label: Tempo
node_types.description: Ableton Link / MIDI-clock tempo source.

node_types.label: Subgraph
node_types.description: Nested graph container. Contains subgraph_input and subgraph_output nodes.

node_types.label: Subgraph Input
node_types.description: Input port of the parent subgraph.

node_types.label: Subgraph Output
node_types.description: Output port of the parent subgraph.

node_types.label: Prompt List
node_types.description: Ordered list of text prompts with weights.

node_types.label: Prompt Blend
node_types.description: Blend/interpolate between multiple prompt lists over time.

node_types.label: Scheduler
node_types.description: Time-based scheduler — fires values at given beats / times.

node_types.label: Output
node_types.description: Alternate sink node used by some UI graphs — prefer 'sink'.
